title: Do Not Eat Your Friends
description: You can't eat potatoes since you are also a potato.
body:
# This mod works and will always only work on the Poisonous Potato Update (24w14potato)

## This mod was made for ModFest: FlashFest Potato

## Introduction

In this update, Mojang let us know that everything is considered as potatoes. In fact, even us are potatoes.

So, if we are all potatoes, why would we be able to eat our beloved potato friends?

Then, I had a beautiful idea: and this mod was born.

This mod removes food usages for the following items:

- `minecraft:potato`
- `minecraft:baked_potato`
- `minecraft:poisonous_potato_fries`
- `minecraft:poisonous_potato_sticks`
- `minecraft:poisonous_potato_slices`
- `minecraft:poisonous_potato_chips`
- `minecraft:hot_potato`
- `minecraft:poisonous_potato` (dude this is stacked by 99 wtf)
- `minecraft:golden_poisonous_potato`
- `minecraft:snektato`

These items will also implore you to not eat them if you try it as displayed in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/dneyf/gallery).
